posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
To change your monday.com board type:

  1. Start by clicking the three-dot menu at the top right of your screen.
  2. Click ‘Settings’.
  3. Next, select ‘Change board type’ and pick which monday.com board type you’d like to change it to.

Screenshot showing how to change monday.com board types.1400×655 267 KB

Only the owner of the board can change the board type in monday.com. If you are not the board owner but would like to make changes to the board type, you will need to be granted permission by the board owner.
